title: 产品资料披露 / Product info disclosure (s.34)
point: Section 34(1) 须向客户及潜在客户披露推荐指定投资产品的所有重大资料(条款、收益与风险、费用、CIS/人寿保单的关系等)。 / s.34(1) requires disclosing all material info on a recommended designated investment product (terms, benefits/risks, charges, CIS/life-policy relationships).
keyfacts: 对象:每位客户及潜在客户 / Every client and prospective client
含 MAS 订明的其他资料 / Plus any info MAS prescribes

title: 虚假/误导陈述罚则 / False or misleading statement penalty (s.35)
point: 意图欺骗作出虚假/误导陈述属罪行,即使合约未成立;罚款最高 S$50,000 或监禁最高 12 个月或两者兼施。 / A false/misleading statement with intent to deceive is an offence even if no contract arises; fine up to S$50,000 or up to 12 months' jail or both.
keyfacts: 遗漏重大事项=误导 / Omitting a material matter counts as misleading

title: 合理基础推荐 / Reasonable basis for recommendation (s.36)
point: 推荐须基于对客户投资目标、财务状况与需要的合理考量与调查;无合理基础且客户依赖致损者,FA 须赔偿损失。 / A recommendation must rest on reasonable consideration of the client's objectives, finances and needs; absent that and where reliance causes loss, the FA is liable in damages.
keyfacts: 适合性=合理基础 / Suitability = reasonable basis
民事赔偿责任 / Civil liability for loss

title: 客户款项账户 / Client money accounts (s.37)
point: 账户上的留置权/索赔权除非为应付 FA 费用否则无效;押记/按揭一律无效。 / A lien/claim on a client account is void unless for fees due to the FA; a charge/mortgage on it is wholly void.
keyfacts: 留置权例外:应付费用 / Lien exception: fees owed
押记/按揭无效 / Charge/mortgage void

title: 保费独立账户 / Separate premium account (s.41 / FAR Reg 20)
point: 收取保险款项的 FA 须在 Banking Act 1970 下持牌银行开立独立人寿保费账户;提款仅限四种情形(付有权人、付保险人、持牌银行投资、退误存)。 / An FA receiving insurance moneys must keep a separate premium account at a Banking Act 1970-licensed bank; withdrawals limited to four cases.
keyfacts: 投资亏损须补足差额 / Make good any investment shortfall

title: 未持牌保险人 / Unlicensed insurers (s.42)
point: 持牌/获豁免 FA 不得与未持牌保险人洽商保险合约;不适用于再保险及新加坡以外风险;MAS 在例外情形下可特许。 / A licensed/exempt FA must not negotiate insurance with an unlicensed insurer; excludes reinsurance and risks outside Singapore; MAS may permit exceptions.
keyfacts: 目的:遏制境外网售保险 / Targets cross-border internet sales

title: 利益冲突披露 / Conflict-of-interest disclosure (s.45 / FAR Reg 20A)
point: 推荐指定产品的通函须以不逊于正文的清晰度披露权益;就上市指定产品须设登记册,取得权益后 7 日内登记、保留不少于 5 年。 / Circulars recommending specified products must disclose interests in equally legible type; a register of Listed Specified Products must be entered within 7 days and kept at least 5 years.
keyfacts: 抗辩:当时不知且不能合理预期知 / Defence: not and not reasonably aware
罚款 S$25,000 / 12 个月 / Fine S$25,000 / 12 months

title: 无抵押贷款上限 / Unsecured credit cap (FAR Reg 18)
point: FA 向其董事/高级人员/雇员/代表授予的无抵押垫款、贷款或信贷便利,任何一刻未偿还合计不得超过 S$3,000。 / Unsecured advances/loans/credit to an FA's directors/officers/employees/representatives must not exceed S$3,000 outstanding in aggregate at any time.
keyfacts: "董事"含配偶及多类亲属 / "Director" includes spouse and relatives

title: CEO/董事审批 / CEO & director approval (s.63)
point: 委任 CEO 或董事、或将董事由非执行改为执行须经 MAS 事先批准(提交 Form 11)。 / Appointing a CEO/director, or changing a director from non-executive to executive, needs prior MAS approval via Form 11.
keyfacts: 外国公司非常驻董事可豁免 / Non-Singapore foreign-company director exempt
准则见 FAR Reg 13(2) / Criteria in FAR Reg 13(2)

title: 禁止令 / Prohibition orders (s.68-70)
point: 禁止令阻止不适当人士提供服务或参与管理/任董事/任大股东,只在很严重罪行时发出;受禁令通知的 FA 不得在禁止范围内聘用该人,违者罚款最高 S$50,000。 / A prohibition order bars unfit persons from service or from managing/directing/being a substantial shareholder, only for very serious offences; a notified FA must not employ the person, breach fined up to S$50,000.
keyfacts: 可于 30 日内向部长上诉 / Appeal to Minister within 30 days

title: 高级人员罪行与伪造记录 / Officer offences & falsification (s.112, 113)
point: 高级人员未采取一切合理步骤确保合规或陈述准确(s.112),或故意伪造/遗漏/更改记录(s.113),罚款最高 S$100,000 或监禁最高 2 年或两者兼施。 / An officer failing reasonable steps for compliance/accuracy (s.112), or wilfully falsifying/omitting/altering records (s.113), faces a fine up to S$100,000 or up to 2 years' jail or both.
keyfacts: 最重罚则梯级 / Heaviest penalty tier
适用审计师/雇员/代理人 / Also auditor/employee/agent
